titleStmt.title: SII 10.74: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 74. (A.R. No. 327 of 1915.) ON THE NĀGA PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF KŌDANDARĀMASVĀMI, KOPPARAM, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Ś. 1037. (Jaya.)

summary.p: States that Kannara-Chōḍadēva's minister Māra, son of Īśvara-Nāyaka, got two tanks dug and built the temple of Sōmīśvara in Koppara in Kamma-vishaya, that Kannaradēva granted the village of Kopparam and his brother Chōḍa-Balli the village of Bīḍepalli to the said temple and that Mallikārjuna of the Kālāmukha sect who was a native of Prātūr was made the trustee (?) of the said temple and endowment. Gives a detailed account of the endowments in the land assigned to different persons engaged in the management of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti caraṇasarōruhavi
hatavilōcana tri
lōcanapramukhākhila
pridhvīśvara kāritakāvē
rītīra karikālakulara
tnapradīpāhitakumā
rāṁkuśa śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara
kannaradēvacōḍama
hīpālassakalabhūpā
latilakaḥ . śrīkāmacō
ḍakṣitipālaputraḥ pra
tyartthikāṁtāgaḷanūtradātraḥ .
rāmāṁbarīṣādi lasaccari
traḥ sūryyānvayāṁbhōruhaṣa
ṁḍamitraḥ . Āsīttasya kulapra
dhānapadavī vibhrājita śrīnidhi rbhbhā
ṁḍāgāramahādhikāramahi
taḥ pratyakṣadharmmātmajaḥ . dhīmā
nīśvaranāyakasya tanayō mā
rābhidhānaḥ kritī nityaṁ dharmma
nibaddhabuddhi rasakri tpuṇyakri
yāvarddhanaḥ . śrīśailaprā
gbhāgēkammakṣitimahitako
pparagrāmē dvau khānitau taṭākau
tēna svētūpamānaghanasē
tū . sōmēśvaraṁ pratiṣṭhāpya
tīrtthaṁ sōmēśvarōpamaṁ . tatrā
karō nmahādhīrō māraḥ pau
ruṣapāragaḥ . girirāmakhēṁ
dugaṇitē śakabhūpābdē jayā
bdakē . caittrē sūryyagrahaṇa
nimittē kritavān tā nmahādharmmān .

Adha nijapradhāninaḥ pauruṣa mādṛ
tya rājakannaradēva ssamāgatyā
smi npuṇyatīrtthē supratiṣṭhitaṁ sōmē
śvaradēvaṁ natvā bhaktiprēritamanā
dēvā yainaṁ kopparagrāmaṁ
dattavān . tadhaiva tadanujanmā cō
ḍaballidēvaḥ pūrvvadiśi krōśamātrē
bīḍepallināma grāmaṁ prādāt . tataḥ
samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṁḍalēśvara dharmmavurādhīśvara
sakalaripudarppamarddana bhujaṁgga
rolugaṁḍa nirmmaladhavalakaṭakādhināya
ka kaḍiyarābharaṇa kiraṇapuradahana
satyavibhūṣaṇa samaraikavijaya śrī
viṣṇuvarddhanapādapaṁkajabhramarāyamā
na śrīmanmahāmaṇḍḍalēśvara kaḍiyarā
jaṁ kammaviṣayasya prabhusvāmina masya
dharmmasya karttā māra ssaṁtōṣayitvāta
ma pyētau grāmau dēvāya prādāpayat .
ślōka . dāpayitvā taṭākau dvau dēvāya ta
danaṁtaraṁprālūrppurasamutpannaṁdhritakā
ḷāmukhavrataṁ [.] mallikhārjjuna mabhyartthya tasmai
tatvārtthabhāvinē . saumēśvaraṁ varaṁ sthānaṁ prādā
dācaṁdratārakaṁ . Atra dattā vrittayaḥ
sthānapatayē kṣētra khaṁḍukāni 20 dharmma
samudrakṣētrē vrīhi kha 15 pūjāri
pavitrarāsi kha 5 vrīhi kha 2 kētaśaurēḥ .
narttakācāryyasya muppanākhyasya kha
6 vrīhi kha 4 narttakī tilakāyāḥ
padmāvatyāḥ kha 12 vrī
hi kha 6 bāgākhya pātrāyāḥ
kha 4 vrīhi kha 2 gāyakīgaurāyāḥ
kha 6 vrīhi kha 4 gāyakādityasya
kha 5 vrīhi kha 3 vāṁśikaśaṁkarasya
kha 5 vrīhi kha 3 nādadāyaka gō
patēḥ kha 3 vrīhi kha 1 mārddalika bō
tasya kha 5 vrīhi kha 3 mārddalikamā
cenākhya dēvabhōgē daśabhāga . bā
marikāyā Eṟiyakāyāḥ
kha 5 vrīhi kha 4 vividhavījana cā
marakaraṁkkavāhinīnāṁ dvādaśa
sēvāvilāsinīnāṁ kha 48 vrīhi
kha 24 dēvaparicarāhvānakasya kha
4 vrīhi kha 2 śaṁkhapūraka bācasya
kha 3 vrīhi kha 1 śilpinaḥ Eṟiyā
cāryyasya kha 3 vrīhi kha 2 mārācā
ryyasya kha 3 vrīhi kha 2 prōlācāryya
sya kha 3 vrīhi kha 2 koṁḍācāryya
sya kha 3 vrīhi kha 2 śaṁkhavāhaka
mallasya kha 2 vrīhi kha 1
Digital edition of SII 10.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
